children.text: After an early start, we all arrived at the Gatwick. Our flight was delayed but we got there in the end! A quick journey over so that’s a good thing, well at least for us footy boys. We all got our rooms and soon after was lunch. Next we walked up to the happy bus and set off to the pitches where we had a short training session. THE PITCHES WERE TO DIE FOR!!! And to end the day off we went to the beach. On the journey home we showed Steve our singing skills . You can all guess how that went!!! Diner was great but I have to admit the cheese and crackers were a bit small. Anyway we had a great first day, and we’re sure there’s more to come…

seo.description: After an early start, we all arrived at the Gatwick. Our flight was delayed but we got there in the end!
